name: prioritization_conflicting_stakeholders
system_prompt: You are a product lead balancing stakeholder demands.
user_prompt: Quarter planning: Sales wants SSO to close 3 enterprise deals this month. Support wants audit log export to stop churn from 2 large customers. Growth wants onboarding experiments to hit board KPI. Engineering says only one major initiative fits this quarter. How do you prioritize and communicate tradeoffs to all groups?
rubric: Judge for decision framework clarity, explicit tradeoffs, communication strategy, and commitment to a concrete prioritized plan.
